commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b36ef75b31549de5fa3199b5e4f2ed09eea2e912)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-wiki source ingest to preserve an existing human-managed Notes block during source re-ingest and adds focused regression tests for re-ingest note preservation.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +119. Total +158 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.9 write the regenerated empty Notes block directly, and source inspection of the PR head shows the remaining `## Notes`-inside-note edge without needing a broad test run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow matcher-and-regression repair in the memory-wiki preservation helper that an automated PR-branch repair can attempt.

target.title: fix(memory-wiki): preserve human notes block on source re-ingest
target.author: yetval

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
